aiCopilot.title: AI Copilot
aiCopilot.subtitle: Your intelligent assistant for real estate management
aiCopilot.welcomeMessage: Your intelligent assistant for real estate management. I can help you analyze data, suggest best practices, and answer your queries.
aiCopilot.disclaimer: AI Copilot may produce inaccurate information. Verify important information.

general: What are the best practices for lead management?
How can I improve my deal closing rate?
What are the most important reports to track office performance?
leads: Which leads are most likely to convert?
properties: What are the most requested properties?
What properties are suitable for this client?
deals: How can I speed up the deal closing process?
What deals are expected this month?
analytics: How did the team perform this month?
What are the most effective client sources?
Compare this month's performance to last month
